nodes.name: 賈德·戴蒙
nodes.summary: 賈德·戴蒙是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黄额园丁鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Bruce Beehler
nodes.summary: Bruce Beehler是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Moluccan king parrot、黄额园丁鸟、Wattled smoky honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Foja Mountains
nodes.summary: Foja Mountains是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括黄额园丁鸟、Wattled smoky honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 黄额园丁鸟
nodes.summary: 黄额园丁鸟（Golden-fronted bowerbird，学名 Amblyornis flavifrons），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于賈德·戴蒙、Foja Mountains、Bruce Beehler。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Originally described in 1895 based on trade skins, this elusive bird remained a mystery for nearly a hundred years, until 31 January 1981 when the American ornithologist Jared Diamond discovered the home ground of the golden-fronted bowerbird at the Foja Mountains in the Papua province of Indonesia."Thought extinct, bird found in New Guinea", Edmonton Journal, 11 November 1981, p

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Originally described in 1895 based on trade skins, this elusive bird remained a mystery for nearly a hundred years, until 31 January 1981 when the American ornithologist Jared Diamond discovered the home ground of the golden-fronted bowerbird at the Foja Mountains in the Papua province of Indonesia."Thought extinct, bird found in New Guinea", Edmonton Journal, 11 November 1981, p

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: F7 thumb|left|200px In December 2005, an international team of eleven scientists from the United States, Australia and Indonesia led by Bruce Beehler traveled to the unexplored areas of Foja Mountains and took the first photographs of the bird.Lost World of New Species Found in Indonesia
